channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Wall Street piles into ‘NACHO’ bet on looming oil shortages in June
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: Match Group’s CEO revived a shuttered Tinder internship program for Gen Z—and received over 30,000 applications for just 27 spots
item.description: Spencer Rascoff says Match Group is taking a “contrarian approach” to how tech businesses are approaching Gen Z talent: he’s hiring more and leveragin...

item.title: The $39 trillion debt is set to surpass its postwar peak—and the math says Washington can’t simply cut its way out
item.description: A new Brookings chart book lays bare the arithmetic: balancing the budget on lower-priority spending alone is "virtually impossible," and the biggest ...

item.title: Whirlpool has a word for what the Iran War is doing to its industry: recession
item.description: "This level of industry decline is similar to what we have observed during the global financial crisis."
